legacy.content:
# Phase 34-01 Plan: Feature-first runtime model completion
## Objective
Complete the feature-first runtime model in engine contracts and explorer/KAPLAY consumers.
## Tasks
1. Lock `space-vectors.featureSchema` as canonical feature registry. 2. Keep compatibility for existing grouped trait/runtime fields while treating all as features. 3. Ensure runtime loaders accept bundle overrides plus generated thematic-basis overlays. 4. Update docs and GRD terminology to feature-first wording.
## Verification
- Engine build passes. - Docs-site typecheck passes. - Space Explorer shows runtime spaces from pack data.
